name: Second-Order XSS
educational_objective: Understand second-order XSS: the injection point and execution point are in completely different parts of the application. The payload passes input validation at creation time and only fires when a separate privileged component renders the stored data without sanitisation.
scenario: DevOps Pipeline — a CI/CD management platform. Users can create webhooks with custom names. The name field passes creation-time validation safely. However, the Super Admin Activity Log renders all webhook names via innerHTML when displaying audit entries — a completely separate code path.
ar_scenario: منصة DevOps Pipeline تُخزّن اسم الـ webhook بأمان عند الإنشاء، لكن سجل النشاط للأدمن يعرض الأسماء عبر innerHTML — مسار كود مختلف تماماً.

hints_metadata.content: The webhook name is stored and displayed in multiple places. Not every renderer applies the same sanitisation. Where is the name displayed to privileged users?
hints_metadata.ar_content: اسم الـ webhook يُخزَّن ويُعرض في أماكن متعددة. ليس كل مكان يطبّق نفس التعقيم. أين يُعرض الاسم للمستخدمين المميّزين؟

hints_metadata.content: The Super Admin Activity Log is the target renderer. It pulls webhook names from the database and inserts them into the DOM. Try naming a webhook with an HTML payload.
hints_metadata.ar_content: سجل النشاط هو المُصيّر المستهدف. يسحب أسماء الـ webhooks من قاعدة البيانات ويدرجها في DOM.

hints_metadata.content: Create a webhook named: — then click 'Trigger Activity Log'. The admin log renders the name via innerHTML — your payload fires in the admin context.
hints_metadata.ar_content: أنشئ webhook باسم: ثم اضغط 'Trigger Activity Log'.

flag_validation.note: Returned from /admin/activity-log endpoint when webhook name contains valid XSS vector

hidden_solution_path.exploit_path: POST /webhook name='' → stored (passes validation) → POST /admin/activity-log → innerHTML renders name → payload fires
hidden_solution_path.key_insight: Injection point (webhook creation) ≠ Execution point (activity log renderer)
hidden_solution_path.fix_summary: Sanitise at render time, not input time. Use textContent for all dynamic content. Audit every DB→DOM path.
